AntiGravityQuantum Hackathon

Where Innovation Meets Entanglement. Join 500+ developers, researchers, and quantum enthusiasts in building the future of quantum computing.

Scroll
About the Event

Redefining What's
Possible with Quantum

Join the world's most innovative quantum computing event where developers, researchers, and enthusiasts come together to push the boundaries of quantum technology.

Our Mission

The AntiGravity Quantum Hackathon aims to accelerate quantum computing innovation by bringing together the brightest minds in the field. We believe in the power of collaboration and open-source development.

Whether you're a quantum computing expert or just starting your journey, this hackathon provides the perfect environment to learn, innovate, and network with industry leaders.

What You'll Get

  • Access to real quantum processors (IBM Q, Google Sycamore, IonQ)
  • Mentorship from quantum computing experts
  • Workshops on Qiskit, Cirq, and PennyLane
  • Networking opportunities with industry leaders
  • Career opportunities at top quantum companies
  • Exclusive quantum computing credits and resources
500+
Participants
10+
Challenges
$100K
Prize Pool
50+
Countries
Challenges

Push the Boundaries
of Quantum Computing

Choose from a variety of exciting challenges that push the boundaries of quantum computing. Work individually or in teams of up to 4 members.

Advanced

Quantum Machine Learning

Develop quantum neural networks and explore quantum-enhanced ML algorithms for real-world applications.

QMLNeural NetworksOptimization
Learn more
Intermediate

Quantum Optimization

Solve complex optimization problems using quantum algorithms like QAOA and VQE.

QAOAVQECombinatorial
Learn more
Advanced

Quantum Cryptography

Build secure communication systems using quantum key distribution and post-quantum cryptography.

QKDSecurityEncryption
Learn more
Intermediate

Quantum Simulation

Simulate quantum systems and materials using quantum computing techniques.

SimulationMaterialsChemistry
Learn more

Don't see a challenge that interests you?

Prizes

Compete for
Glory & Rewards

Compete for over $100,000 in prizes, quantum computing credits, and exclusive opportunities to work with leading quantum companies.

First Place

$50,000

Grand prize plus quantum computing credits and mentorship program

Second Place

$30,000

Quantum computing credits and internship opportunities

Third Place

$20,000

Quantum computing credits and tech gadgets

Agenda

Three Days of
Quantum Innovation

Three days of intensive hacking, learning, and innovation. Here's what to expect.

May 15-17, 2026
48 Hours of Hacking
Berlin, Germany

May 15
09:00

18:00

FAQ

Frequently Asked
Questions

Got questions? We've got answers.

Anyone with an interest in quantum computing can participate! Whether you're a student, researcher, developer, or quantum enthusiast, you're welcome to join. Teams can have 1-4 members.
While prior experience is helpful, it's not required. We provide workshops, tutorials, and mentorship to help beginners get started. There are challenges suitable for all skill levels.
Participants will have access to IBM Quantum Experience, Google Cirq, IonQ Quantum Cloud, and various quantum computing frameworks like Qiskit, Cirq, and PennyLane.
No! The hackathon is completely free to attend. We provide meals, snacks, and swag throughout the event.
Yes! We offer both in-person and remote participation options. Remote participants will have virtual access to all workshops, mentorship, and presentation sessions.
Bring your laptop, charger, and any other devices you need for development. If you're joining in person, we'll provide workspace, power, and internet. Don't forget comfortable clothes!

Still have questions?

AntiGravityQuantum

Where Innovation Meets Entanglement. Join the most exciting quantum computing hackathon of 2026 and help shape the future of quantum technology.
